name: BONGA EEL
description: Bonga Eel is a Korean family-style franchise specializing in premium freshwater eel, hanwoo beef, Jeju black-pork belly, and king shrimp — all served all-you-can-eat.

company.name: Bonga Food Co., Ltd.
company.logistics: 87 Cheongbuk Jungang-ro, Cheongbuk-eup, Pyeongtaek-si, Gyeonggi-do, Korea

hero.kicker: EEL HERITAGE FOR THE NEXT 100 YEARS
hero.title:
Three generations
of Korean
freshwater eel.
hero.subtitle: Stable revenue and self-serve operations support successful franchise launches at home and abroad.
hero.promoBanner: Limited time — fee waivers for stores 16–25. New & rebrand openings welcome.

brand.title: Built on 4 strong years, ready for 10 more — together.
brand.subtitle: Honest quality. Unshakeable brand power.
brand.body: Founded in 2023, Bonga Eel grew from its Gwanggyo flagship in Suwon to 18 franchise locations across Korea.

promo.title: 25-store Launch Promotion
promo.body: For new and rebrand franchise openings — franchise fee, deposit, and audit fee are waived. Contact Bonga Eel HQ for details.
